name: Grilled Seafood Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the barbecue sauce, honey, and stone-ground dijon mustard.
Mix well to ensure even distribution of flavors.
2. Thread alternating pieces of shrimp, sea scallops, and mushrooms onto the wooden skewers.
Make sure each skewer has an equal number of each ingredient.
3. Place the prepared skewers in a baking pan.
4. Pour the marinade over the skewers, ensuring that all pieces are well-coated.
5. Allow the kabobs to marinate in the refrigerator for at least 12 hours (or overnight).
6. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
7. Place the marinated kabobs on the grill and cook for 7 to 8 minutes per side, or until the shrimp have turned pink.
Turn the skewers frequently to prevent burning.
8. Baste the kabobs with additional marinade as needed while grilling.
9. Use a covered grill or place the skewers under a broiler to achieve a smoky flavor without direct exposure to flames.
10. Garnish the finished kabobs with fresh fruit before serving.
